devdoc.details: Smart contract for immutable audit logging Supports both hash-based logging (off-chain data) and full event logging (on-chain data) Now uses AccessControl for role-based permissions

getAdminApprovalCount().details: Get the total number of admin approval entries

getAuditHashCount().details: Get the total number of audit hash entries

getAuditHistory(uint256,uint256,uint256,.details: Get audit hash entries within a time range (paginated) SPRINT 2 FEATURE: Allows retrieving historical audit data

returns.totalInRange: Total count of entries in the time range

getAuditStats().details: Get audit statistics SPRINT 2 FEATURE: Dashboard statistics for audit overview

getCriticalEventCount().details: Get the total number of critical event entries

getRecentAudits(uint256).details: Get the most recent N audit entries SPRINT 2 FEATURE: Quick access to recent audit activity

params.count: Number of recent entries to retrieve

logAdminApproval(string,string,string,st.details: Log an admin approval event (on-chain storage)

params.approvalId: Unique identifier for the approval request
params.eventType: The type of event being approved

logAuditHash(bytes32,string).details: Log an audit hash (for off-chain data verification)

params.hash: The SHA256 hash of the audit record stored off-chain

logCriticalEvent(string,string,string).details: Log a critical event with full details (on-chain storage)

params.details: JSON string with full event details

verifyHash(bytes32).details: Verify if a hash exists in the blockchain

returns.timestamp: The timestamp when the hash was logged
